; --- globals ---
@.fmt.int_println = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"%d\0A\00", align 1

; --- declarations ---
declare i32 @printf(ptr, ...)

; --- definitions ---
; @InputKt_countMultiples
define i32 @InputKt_countMultiples(i32 %arg0, i32 %arg1) {
entry:
  %merge_3 = alloca i32
  %merge_6 = alloca i32
  %t0 = add i32 0, 0
  store i32 %t0, ptr %merge_3
  %t1 = add i32 0, 1
  store i32 %t1, ptr %merge_6
  br label %bb1
bb1:
  %t2 = load i32, ptr %merge_6
  %t3 = icmp sle i32 %t2, %arg0
  br i1 %t3, label %bb2, label %bb4
bb2:
  %t4 = load i32, ptr %merge_6
  %t5 = srem i32 %t4, %arg1
  %t6 = add i32 0, 0
  %t7 = icmp eq i32 %t5, %t6
  br i1 %t7, label %bb5, label %bb6
bb3:
  %t8 = add i32 0, 1
  %t9 = load i32, ptr %merge_6
  %t10 = add i32 %t9, %t8
  store i32 %t10, ptr %merge_6
  br label %bb1
bb4:
  %t11 = load i32, ptr %merge_3
  ret i32 %t11
bb5:
  %t12 = load i32, ptr %merge_3
  %t13 = add i32 0, 1
  %t14 = add i32 %t12, %t13
  store i32 %t14, ptr %merge_3
  br label %bb7
bb6:
  br label %bb7
bb7:
  br label %bb3
}

; @main
define i32 @main() {
entry:
  %t0 = add i32 0, 100
  %t1 = add i32 0, 3
  %t2 = call i32 @InputKt_countMultiples(i32 %t0, i32 %t1)
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t2)
  %t4 = add i32 0, 100
  %t5 = add i32 0, 7
  %t6 = call i32 @InputKt_countMultiples(i32 %t4, i32 %t5)
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t6)
  %t8 = add i32 0, 50
  %t9 = add i32 0, 5
  %t10 = call i32 @InputKt_countMultiples(i32 %t8, i32 %t9)
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t10)
  ret i32 0
}
